# Grazoprevir 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Grazoprevir 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Grazoprevir</strong> 目前有 <strong>15 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Grazoprevir 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：ZEPATIER is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C (CHC) in adult and paediatric patients 12 years of age and older who weigh at least 30 kg (see sections 4.2, 4.4 and 5.1). For hepatitis...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>chronic hepatitis C virus infection（99.9%）</li>
<li>hepatitis C virus infection（99.8%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>hepatitis B virus infection（99.7%）</li>
<li>hepatitis E virus infection（99.6%）</li>
<li>hepatitis A virus infection（99.6%）</li>
<li>hepatitis, viral, animal（99.6%）</li>
<li>Omsk hemorrhagic fever（99.6%）</li>
<li>Kyasanur forest disease（99.6%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（99.6%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（99.5%）</li>
<li>chronic hepatitis B virus infection（98.2%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（97.1%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（96.1%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（95.8%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（95.8%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（95.7%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（95.0%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（94.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/grazoprevir/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
